source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Editorial English culinary UI with stable tabular numbers, compact operation labels, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese sourcing, inventory, recipe, order, and kitchen-prep screens.
layout: Dense 8px culinary operation grids, moss-green navigation rails, recipe and sourcing cards, inventory tables, prep dashboards, cap-satin and reticulated-stem texture samples, and restrained 8px component radii.

prompts.label: Transparent porcini mushroom motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a porcini mushroom motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete culinary forest subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single mature porcini mushroom with a rounded chestnut-brown cap, subtle satin cap highlights, thick cream-colored bulbous stem with delicate tan reticulation, firm edible bolete form, and a small attached base of pine-forest moss with a few short pine needles. The identity must read as porcini / Boletus edulis, not button mushroom, shiitake, amanita, chanterelle, or generic toadstool.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full cap, complete stem, and compact moss base without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves cap texture, stem pores, and moss detail. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no basket, no plate, no knife, no kitchen, no full forest scene, no extra mushrooms, no red or white-spotted cap, no fairy-tale toadstool, no hand, no props beyond the compact attached moss and pine-needle base.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Porcini light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Porcini", derived from the visible porcini mushroom motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible hearty culinary UI system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, hearty culinary system mood. Use large legible labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections with readable headings: Morphous Porcini, Porcini Mushroom, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Culinary Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language only from the porcini motif: chestnut-brown cap, cream reticulated stem, moss green, pine-needle brown, forest-soil darks, pore beige, warm cap highlights, and woodland shadow neutrals. The board must read as porcini mushroom in a pine forest, not button mushroom, amanita, generic mushroom, cafe branding, or beige-only rustic decor.
Typography: English product UI guidance plus Japanese typography guidance; include labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use compact bilingual culinary inventory, recipe, sourcing, order, and batch labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, recipe cards, sourcing list, inventory count cards, prep dashboard, table rows, command search palette, sidebar navigation, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, filters, status chips, token swatches, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn product design system, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, warm cream stem surfaces, chestnut cap primary actions, moss-green navigation and success states, pine-brown dividers, pore-beige muted fields, subtle cap-satin texture and moss texture overlays, dense but scannable culinary operations dashboard, restrained sophisticated food-system UI.
Constraints: use motif-derived colors only, no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only one-note palette, no red-and-white amanita cap, no restaurant marketing hero layout, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Porcini", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Porcini dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Porcini" / "Porcini Mushroom". Translate the same light design-system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, hearty culinary system mood. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections with readable headings: Morphous Porcini, Porcini Mushroom, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Culinary Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve motif-derived colors only from porcini and pine forest: chestnut-brown cap actions, cream stem text and highlights, moss-green navigation and success states, pine-needle brown dividers, forest-soil deep backgrounds, pore-beige muted panels, cap-satin texture, reticulated stem texture, moss texture, culinary inventory/order tables, prep dashboard, command search, status chips, and an 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as porcini mushroom in a pine forest, not button mushroom, amanita, generic mushroom, cafe branding, or black-and-orange gaming UI.
Typography: English product UI guidance plus Japanese typography guidance; include labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use compact bilingual culinary inventory, recipe, sourcing, order, and batch labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, recipe cards, sourcing list, inventory count cards, prep dashboard, table rows, command search palette, sidebar navigation, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, filters, status chips, token swatches, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep forest-soil and chestnut-charcoal background, warm branch-dark panels, cream stem foreground text, porcini chestnut primary actions, moss-green focus rings and success chips, pore-beige muted fields, pine-brown outlines, restrained contrast, crisp controls and dashboards, subtle cap-satin grain and moss overlays.
Constraints: use motif-derived colors only, no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradient dominance, no generic black-and-orange gaming UI, no red-and-white amanita cap, no restaurant marketing hero layout, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Porcini", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
